info.title: Revive API
info.description: Backend API for the Revive platform — pre-sale renovation management, property analysis, deal tracking, and more.

get.description: Returns the current health status of the API. No authentication required. Use this to verify API connectivity.

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: Firebase UID of the admin user (e.g., 'abc123def456').

patch.description: Updates the email address for an admin user identified by their Firebase UID.

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: Firebase UID of the admin user.

patch.description: Updates profile fields for an admin user. All fields are optional — only included fields are updated.

agentId.description: HubSpot contact ID for the agent.

after.description: Cursor for pagination — pass the last opportunity ID from the previous page.

isLost.description: When true, returns only lost/closed opportunities. Defaults to false.

startDate.description: Unix timestamp (ms) — only return opportunities created on or after this date.

separateByDealType.description: When true, groups results by deal type.

post.description: Retrieves deal opportunities for a specific agent. Supports pagination, filtering by deal type, date range, and status.

limit.description: Max results to return. Defaults to 25.

search.description: Query string — matches agent name, email, or brokerage.

post.description: Search for agents by name, email, or other criteria. Returns a paginated list.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: HubSpot contact ID for the agent.

get.description: Retrieves a single agent record by their unique agent ID.
Returns all active feature flags for the specified application platform.

post.description: Authenticates a user with Firebase credentials and returns session information including user role and profile.
Creates a new real estate brokerage record.
Searches brokerages by name, location, or other criteria.
Creates a new contact record. Contacts can be associated with deals and opportunities. Syncs to HubSpot.
Search for contacts by name, email, phone, or other fields. Returns paginated results.

get.description: Retrieves a contact by ID, including associated deals and opportunities.

patch.description: Updates fields on an existing contact. Only included fields are modified.

post.description: Creates a new contractor profile. Contractors are assigned to renovation projects and can submit weekly updates.

get.description: Returns all registered contractors with optional filtering.

post.description: Searches contractors by name, company, specialty, or location.

get.description: Retrieves a contractor profile by ID, including assigned projects and status.

patch.description: Updates fields on a contractor profile.

post.description: Creates a new contract document via PandaDoc. Returns the contract ID and edit session.

delete.description: Deletes a contract document. Only draft contracts can be deleted.

post.description: Creates a new renovation estimate for a property with line items from the product catalog.

get.description: Retrieves an estimate by ID including all line items, pricing, status, and change order history.

patch.description: Updates an estimate — modify line items, pricing, status, or other fields.

post.description: Books a meeting between participants. Creates calendar entries and sends notifications.
Starts an async AI image generation job. Returns a job ID to poll for completion.

get.description: Polls an AI prediction job. Returns generated images when complete. Poll every few seconds.

post.description: Returns production deployment status and version information.

parameters.name: dealId
parameters.description: Deal ID to fill scope for.

get.description: Populates project scope by extracting line items from the signed PandaDoc document.

isInPunchList.description: Whether to include in punch list.

verified.description: Whether the item is verified complete.

patch.description: Updates a single project scope item.

rejectedReason.description: Reason for prior rejection, if re-creating.

post.description: Creates a new property record and initiates analysis. Main entry point for the property assessment flow.
Internal migration — updates leads with latest report metadata. Admin only.
Internal migration — converts legacy property lead records. Admin only.
Creates an association between a report and a HubSpot custom object.
Marks a report as complete and triggers final processing including PDF generation.
Manually adds a comparable to a report.
Logs an analytics event when comparables are viewed.
Logs an analytics event when a report PDF is downloaded.
Logs an analytics event when a report is viewed.

post.summary: Create neighborhood report and register user

contact.description: Object with firstname, lastname, email, phone.

post.description: Creates a neighborhood report and registers the requesting user.
Searches for comparable properties near a given address.
Generates a shareable link or sends an invite for a property report.
Upgrades a legacy V1 report to V2 format with enhanced analysis.

get.description: Retrieves a property report with valuation data, condition assessment, comparables, and renovation recommendations.

submittedById.description: User ID who submitted the update.

patch.description: Updates punch list items and status.

post.description: Batch updates task statuses on the punch list.

get.description: Retrieves the punch list — all outstanding items before project completion.

post.description: Creates a new realtor contact profile.

get.description: Retrieves a realtor's profile by contact ID.
Returns all referral records with optional filtering.

post.description: Creates a new referral record for lead attribution.
Logs a visit event for referral tracking.

get.description: Retrieves referral info for a deal.

patch.description: Updates referral info for a deal.

example.prompt: Modern white kitchen with marble countertops

post.description: Generates an AI-reimagined version of a property photo with a specified room style.
Links a reimagined image to a property report.

patch.description: Updates metadata on a reimagine record.

get.description: Retrieves a reimagined image result.

onSchedule.description: Whether the project is on schedule.

completed.description: Array of scope item IDs completed this week.

post.description: Creates a weekly renovation progress update for a project.

patch.description: Updates the free-text summary of work completed.

get.description: Retrieves a single weekly update.

patch.description: Modifies a weekly update — schedule status, completed items, or notes.

post.description: Generates an annual or periodic analytics report.

get.description: Returns all products in the renovation catalog with pricing.

post.description: Adds a new product to the renovation catalog.

get.description: Returns all product type categories.
Retrieves a product by ID.

delete.description: Removes a product from the catalog.

get.description: Returns options for a product type (e.g., countertop materials for kitchen).
Returns selections for an option (e.g., granite colors).

example.note: Initial RMA for kitchen and bathroom renovation

post.description: Creates a new Renovation Management Agreement. Triggers notifications and sets up the contract pipeline.

get.description: Returns all RMAs with optional filtering by status, deal, or contractor.
Returns all RMA contract documents across projects.

post.description: Creates an edit or signing session for an RMA contract.

get.description: Retrieves an RMA by ID including contract status, activity logs, draw history, and notes.

patch.description: Updates RMA fields — status, amount, draw information, or metadata.

get.description: Returns the audit log for an RMA including status changes, contract events, and draws.

post.description: Creates a new contract document for the RMA via PandaDoc.

delete.description: Deletes the RMA contract. Only drafts can be deleted.

get.description: Downloads the RMA contract as a PDF.
Creates or retrieves an edit session for the RMA contract.

post.description: Sends the RMA contract to all recipients for e-signature.

example.note: Contractor requested schedule extension — approved by PM.

post.description: Adds a note to the RMA's activity feed.

get.description: Retrieves all notes for an RMA in chronological order.

example.content: Unable to access estimate for deal #12345

post.description: Submits a new support ticket with contact info and issue details.
Multi-source home image lookup by address. Queries AnyProp, Zillow, RestB, deduplicates results.
Detects and removes duplicate images using perceptual hashing. Returns only unique images.
Retrieves market health indicators for given ZIP codes using House Canary.

get.description: Returns all Vision AI property analysis reports.

rejected.description: Whether this is a re-submission after rejection.

post.description: Creates a new AI property analysis report from photos.
Completes a neighborhood report and optionally saves photos.
Creates a neighborhood report and registers the user.
Processes and analyzes photos for a neighborhood report.
Completes a neighborhood report that includes photo analysis.
Searches Vision AI reports by address or other criteria.
Upgrades a V1 Vision AI report to V2 format.

get.description: Retrieves a Vision AI report by ID.

patch.description: Updates fields on a Vision AI report.

viewOnly.description: When true, returns results without saving.

post.description: Recalculates a report with updated timeline or parameters.
Handles incoming referral data from affiliate partners. Called by partner systems.
Handles incoming data from GVG for property valuation updates.
Handles HubSpot workflow action to create a company record.
Handles HubSpot workflow to invite a realtor to the platform.
Handles production events from HubSpot workflows.
Sends report reminder emails.
Handles HubSpot actions for internal team notifications.
Handles HubSpot workflow to update company records.
Handles HubSpot workflow to sync contractor data.
Handles HubSpot workflow to update a realtor's Edge URL.
Handles PandaDoc events for document-object associations.
Handles PandaDoc events to sync project scope items from signed documents.
Receives case study data from the marketing website.
Retrieves comparable sales data based on address and condition score.

recommendations.description: Cabinets show significant wear — recommend full replacement
Tile grout needs replacement, fixtures dated

imageUrls.description: Array of image URLs to analyze.

post.description: Submits property photos for AI condition analysis. Returns condition score, features, and renovation recommendations.
Generates a full property analysis report with condition assessment, comparables, market data, and renovation recommendations.
Submits feedback on an analysis report.
Analyzes photos to identify rooms, features, and condition issues without a full report.
Re-runs analysis with updated comparable properties.

get.description: Retrieves renovation-specific analysis with recommendations and ROI projections.

post.description: Enhanced comparable lookup using V2 analysis engine with improved matching.

get.description: Returns all configured calendars for scheduling.

clienttimeout.description: Timeout in ms for booking operations.

post.description: Creates a new calendar configuration.

get.description: Retrieves a calendar by ID.

dealname.description: Display name, typically the property address.

post.description: Creates a new deal in the HubSpot pipeline. Deals are routed to the appropriate pipeline and stage based on deal type.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all opportunities. Supports filtering by status, deal type, and assignee.
Returns opportunities assigned to a specific admin user.

patch.description: Updates fields on an opportunity — stage, amount, notes, or custom properties.

get.description: Retrieves a single opportunity with contacts, property data, estimates, and status history.

delete.description: Deletes an opportunity. Requires the associated contact ID for cleanup.

post.description: Links an existing contact to an opportunity.
Creates a new contact and associates it with the opportunity in one call.
Removes the link between a contact and an opportunity.

get.description: Retrieves the onsite visit for this opportunity.

post.description: Schedules a new onsite visit for this opportunity's property.
Creates a Stripe checkout session. Returns a URL to redirect the user to Stripe's hosted checkout.
Creates a Stripe payment intent for a one-time renovation payment.

delete.description: Cancels an active Stripe subscription for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieves the current subscription status for the authenticated user.

post.description: Handles incoming Stripe webhook events. Called by Stripe, not by your application.

get.description: Retrieves all custom property definitions for a HubSpot object type.
Retrieves a single property definition by name.

clientSituation.description: Description of client's situation and needs.

post.description: Creates a referral with additional client situation data.
Creates a new platform user with role-based access.

get.description: Returns all platform users with optional filtering by role.
Returns users designated as HubSpot owners — used for deal assignment.
Retrieves a user profile by Firebase UID including role, permissions, and activity.

patch.description: Updates profile fields for a user. Only included fields are modified.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user — marks as deleted but retains for audit.

post.description: Creates a V2 property analysis report with enhanced AI capabilities.
Enhanced AI condition analysis with improved accuracy.

patch.description: Updates a HubSpot custom object record for a Vision AI report.

id.description: Report ID to add images to.

post.description: Processes and uploads images for a V2 Vision AI report.
Adds a note explaining why a report was rejected.

csv.description: CSV data object for batch processing.

post.description: Runs the property data scraper for Vision AI reports.

get.description: Exports scraper results as a CSV file.

post.description: Generates a full report from scraped property data.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Health checks and system status endpoints.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication and session management. All auth endpoints use Firebase for identity verification.

tags.name: Admins
tags.description: Manage admin users — update profiles, emails, and permissions.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Agent operations — search agents, retrieve opportunities, and manage agent-related data.

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Create, search, and manage contacts associated with deals and opportunities.

tags.name: Contractors
tags.description: Contractor management — profiles, assignments, dashboards, and contractor-related operations.

tags.name: Estimates
tags.description: Create, update, duplicate, and manage renovation estimates and change orders with line items from the product catalog.

tags.name: Opportunities
tags.description: Deal opportunities — create, update, associate contacts, track status, and manage onsite visits.

tags.name: Deals
tags.description: Deal creation and pipeline management in HubSpot.

tags.name: Property
tags.description: Property data — lookups, valuations, images, reports, comparables, and property-related analytics.

tags.name: Homes
tags.description: Home records — create, retrieve, and manage home details and associated property data.

tags.name: Vision Ai
tags.description: AI-powered property analysis — condition reports, photo analysis, neighborhood reports, scraping tools, and renovation recommendations.

tags.name: Analyze
tags.description: Property analysis tools — AI condition assessment, comparable property lookup, photo analysis, and full report generation.

tags.name: Rma
tags.description: Renovation Management Agreements — create, manage, track contracts, handle draws, and manage signing workflows.

tags.name: Contracts
tags.description: Document contracts — creation, signing sessions, status tracking, and PandaDoc integration.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Payment processing via Stripe — checkout sessions, subscriptions, payment intents, and webhook handling.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Platform user management — create, retrieve, update, and delete users with role-based access.

tags.name: Calendars
tags.description: Calendar management — scheduling, availability, and calendar configuration for meetings and onsite visits.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Inbound webhook handlers for HubSpot, PandaDoc, affiliate partners, and other third-party integrations.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: File and media management — upload, retrieve, organize, and delete photos, documents, and attachments.

tags.name: Referrals
tags.description: Referral tracking — create, update, and manage referral records and attribution across deal types.

tags.name: Ret Catalog
tags.description: Renovation product catalog — browse product types, options, selections, and pricing for estimates.

tags.name: Marketing Center
tags.description: Marketing tools — flyers, brochures, campaigns, and marketing material management for agents.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Push notifications and in-app messaging — send targeted alerts to users across platforms.

tags.name: Onsite Visits
tags.description: Onsite visit scheduling, tracking, and management for property inspections and contractor walkthroughs.

tags.name: Project Scopes
tags.description: Project scope management — line items, scope changes, and renovation project tracking.

tags.name: Broadcast
tags.description: Broadcast messaging — send communications to groups of users via SMS, email, or push notifications.

tags.name: WeeklyUpdates
tags.description: Weekly renovation progress updates — create, view, edit, and delete update reports for active projects.

tags.name: Utility
tags.description: Utility endpoints — multi-source home image lookups, image deduplication, and market health checks.

tags.name: Predictions
tags.description: AI image generation — create and poll async prediction jobs for material and design visualizations.

tags.name: Reimagine
tags.description: AI-powered home reimagining — generate design visualizations and renovation previews using AI image generation.

tags.name: AppConfigs
tags.description: Application configuration — feature flags and app settings per platform (dashboard, admin, mobile).

tags.name: Automated Valuation Models
tags.description: Automated property valuation using third-party data sources.

tags.name: Brokerages
tags.description: Brokerage management — create, update, and manage real estate brokerage records and associations.

tags.name: Case Studies
tags.description: Case study management for marketing materials and website content.

tags.name: Esignatures
tags.description: Electronic signature management via PandaDoc — document status and signing workflows.

tags.name: Follow Up Boss
tags.description: Integration with Follow Up Boss CRM — sync contacts, leads, and deal data.

tags.name: Meetings
tags.description: Meeting scheduling — book, update, and manage meetings between agents, homeowners, and contractors.

tags.name: Migrations
tags.description: Data migration utilities for internal platform upgrades.

tags.name: Partners
tags.description: Partner management — affiliate and referral partner records.

tags.name: Production
tags.description: Production environment management and deployment status.

tags.name: Punch List
tags.description: Punch list management — track outstanding items and tasks for renovation project completion.

tags.name: Realtors
tags.description: Realtor profiles — create and retrieve realtor contact information.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Report generation — annual reports, analytics exports, and data summaries.

tags.name: Support
tags.description: Support ticket submission — create tickets with contact details and issue descriptions.

tags.name: Properties
tags.description: HubSpot property definitions — retrieve custom property metadata for objects.
